name: veeqo
description: Reads orders, products, customers, warehouses, suppliers, purchase orders, sales channels, delivery methods, and tags from the Veeqo API, and writes orders, products, customers, suppliers, warehouses, delivery methods, tags, sales channels, product properties, payments, and shipments.

risk.read: external Veeqo API read of order, product, customer, and inventory data
risk.write: external mutation of Veeqo orders, products, customers, suppliers, warehouses, delivery methods, tags, sales channels, product properties, payments, and shipments; approval required
risk.approval: read: none; write: required for every action
